category_sources: source_facts.description says it is Apache CloudStack CloudMonkey CLI; Apache CloudStack official download page describes CloudMonkey as the CLI and shell for CloudStack-based clouds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cloudmonkey; Apache CloudStack official materials use CloudMonkey.
docs_sources: Official Apache CloudStack documentation is the CloudStack docs surface for CloudMonkey; official Apache GitHub README is repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports Apache CloudStack and CLI tags; source_facts.executables identifies the cmk command.
